scripts.test: tsc -p tsconfig.test.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.runtime-test.json && node -e "require('node:fs').writeFileSync('node_modules/.cache/storage-runtime-test/package.json', '{\"type\":\"commonjs\"}')" && node node_modules/.cache/storage-runtime-test/packages/storage-runtime/tests/run-tests.js
